artifacts.excerpt:
the blackpill on going away to college is it destroys community

just as you finish HS and become an "adult", you uproot and go somewhere you have no real connection to

4 years later you do it again

even if you don't, your friends do

no wonder we feel unmoored these days

actually that's not true. you've bought freedom from your inner and outer critics, but you *can* still blow it by not actually learning anything.

get complacent, don't commit to the bit, lose accountability ... and you've cheated yourself

so experiment wholeheartedly
